title: Wormhole Potion
description: Adds the Wormhole Potion from Terraria into Minecraft!
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

Adds the Wormhole Potion from Terraria into Minecraft!

Just right-click the potion and choose your target!

 

If you want to get updates on the mod development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG

Disclaimer: Even tho I made this mod I only own the rights to some of the textures used.
